data.content: Approved: src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-knots-next-guard.test.ts includes the three requested pre-dispatch rollback edge case tests for rollbackBeatState throwing, post-rollback non-claimable state, and already-claimable queue state. Scope is test-only and matches the knot description. Verification: focused vitest file passed (13/13), full unit suite passed (139 files, 2020 tests), bunx tsc --noEmit passed, and bun run build passed. bun run lint fails in this checkout due pre-existing repo-wide issues, primarily generated .claude/worktrees/*/.next artifacts and unrelated baseline warnings/errors, not this change.
